summary: Frontend testing completed for automatic order status emails feature. All 5 features tested and working correctly: Ship button visibility, modal with carrier dropdown and tracking field, status change to shipped, tracking info display, and toast confirmation.

ui_bugs.issue: Tu parte (80%): €NaN displayed when order.total_amount is undefined

passed_tests: Producer orders page shows 'Marcar como Enviado' button for orders with status 'paid'
Button NOT shown for 'pending' status orders (correct validation)
Clicking button opens modal with 'Marcar como Enviado' header
Modal shows carrier dropdown with options: SEUR, MRW, Correos, Correos Express, DHL, UPS, FedEx, GLS, Nacex, Otro
Modal shows tracking number input field with placeholder 'Ej: 1234567890'
Modal shows info box about email notification to customer and seller
After confirming, order status changes to 'shipped' (purple 'Enviado' badge)
Tracking info displayed in purple box: 'Información de Envío' with carrier and tracking number
Toast message confirms: '¡Pedido marcado como enviado! Se ha notificado al cliente por email.'
Database correctly updated with status='shipped', shipping_carrier, tracking_number, shipped_at timestamp
action_items: MINOR: Fix NaN display in 'Tu parte (80%)' when order.total_amount is undefined - add null check
critical_code_review_comments: ShipOrderModal component properly implemented with form validation
Status validation correctly restricts shipping to paid/confirmed/preparing orders
Local state update after successful API call provides immediate UI feedback
Email notification info box provides good UX transparency
seed_data_creation: Updated order_ba76cf2ad69d to 'paid' status for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order shipping feature fully tested. order_ba76cf2ad69d was marked as shipped with carrier MRW and tracking MRW987654321. Two orders now have 'shipped' status (order_e5 and order_ba). Minor NaN display bug exists when total_amount is undefined.

ship_order_button.description: Button visible only for paid/confirmed/preparing orders

status_change.description: Order status changes to 'shipped' with purple badge

tracking_info_display.description: Purple info box shows carrier and tracking number

toast_notification.message: ¡Pedido marcado como enviado! Se ha notificado al cliente por email.
